sections.title: Voyage
paragraphs: [ethera] sailed along the [track] through the North Sea and English Channel, passing the Belgian and Dutch coast. The green line on the map shows the route. Red markers show where the ship crossed underwater cables or pipelines — click any name below to find it on the map.

sections.title: Cable & pipeline crossings
paragraphs: Along the route, the ship crossed several communications cables: [concerto-1s-0], [hermes-south-0], [pan-european-crossing-pec-0], [rioja-3-0], [tangerine-0], and [rioja-2-0]. It also crossed the [franpipe-0] gas pipeline, the [interconnector-0] (UK–Belgium gas link), and the [nemo-link-0] power cable. Near the wind farms it crossed export cables such as [rentel-exportkabel-0], [thorntonbank-exportkabel-b-0], [norther-exportkabel-0], [belwind-exportkabel-0], and [northwind-exportkabel-0].

sections.title: Suspicious activity context
paragraphs: Vessel activity was reported close to critical infrastructure, including wind farms and subsea cables, and AIS was reportedly switched off during the period of interest. This pattern is consistent with possible reconnaissance or infrastructure-mapping behavior.

sections.title: Map tips
paragraphs: Click [track] or [cable-crossings] to jump to the map. Click the green line for voyage dates. Click red markers for crossing details.

properties.name: NEMO Crossing
properties.desc: NEMO interconnector (UK–Belgium, 1000MW HVDC). Crossed at 6 kts, 0312 UTC. No anomalies.

properties.name: NordLink Approach
properties.desc: NordLink HVDC cable (Norway–Germany, 1400MW). Crossed in F7 winds, 3.5m swell. Routine.

properties.name: Viking Link Transit
properties.desc: Viking Link HVDC (UK–Denmark, 1400MW). Tracked parallel for 14nm. AIS alert triggered. Anchor secured, double bridge watch.

properties.name: Norwegian Trench Entry
properties.desc: NPD pipeline cluster crossing. Depth >700m. Reduced speed. Multiple registered pipeline routes in zone.
